text: Set up CDN for Instagram image hosting (CRITICAL BLOCKER)
description:
Instagram Graph API requires publicly accessible image URLs.

Current: Local filesystem only
Needed: CDN integration

Options:
- Cloudinary (generous free tier, auto-optimization)
- AWS S3 + CloudFront (scalable, pay-as-you-go)
- Vercel Blob (simple, integrated)

Implementation: ~4 hours
- Sign up + get API keys
- Add upload function to generate.ts
- Store CDN URLs in content.json
- Update publish.ts to use CDN URLs

This UNBLOCKS Instagram publishing entirely.
